## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (run from `frontend/` or `mobile/`)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport / device
- [ ] Version bumped in `frontend/package.json` + `frontend/src/version.js` (if web change)
- [ ] Version bumped in `mobile/package.json` (if mobile change)
- [ ] Commit message starts with version: `v1.2.3: description`
